title: 1k Hyper Realistic Dirt block
description: This pack added hyper realistic dirt blocks to the game. Textures from polyhaven
body:
This pack added hyper realistic dirt blocks to the game.

This pack supports POM and PBR, and looks very cool, this pack can run on integrated graphics at about 30-60FPS with SEUS renewed. This pack preformes well on some integrated graphics such as Itel UHD graphics.
